The unit in which the observation value is expressed.
Scale factor applied to the observation value (e.g. thousands, millions).
Status code indicating the censoring relation that qualifies the observation value, or that no censoring relation applies.
Interpretive note associated with the observation.
Reporting frequency of the observation (annual, quarterly, monthly, daily, …).
Quality or interpretive status of the observation (e.g. estimated, provisional, final).

NAME_EN.was: Time period activity related to when the data are collected

DESCRIPTION.now: Method by which the observation's time period was determined or reported, e.g. middle of fieldwork, end of fieldwork, or other.
